errorMessages.WMS-01: User {userId} was not found in the system.
errorMessages.WMS-02: Pallet {palletId} was not found in BlueYonder. Please verify that the correct data is being sent and that the pallet exists in the system.
errorMessages.WMS-03: EAN {ean} was not found in the system.
errorMessages.WMS-04: Duplicate serial number detected. Serial number {serialNumber} already exists in the system.
errorMessages.WMS-05: Pallet {palletId} already has a scan record in the system.
errorMessages.WMS-06: A database error occurred while processing the request.
errorMessages.ERR-06: Height {{height}} cm is out of tolerance.
